description_long: This is a modern double bed featuring a rectangular, solid headboard and a low-profile frame. The bed is dressed with a large, smooth gray comforter that drapes over the sides, and two pillows are neatly placed at the head. The frame appears to be constructed from a sturdy material, likely wood or engineered wood, with a white finish. Notably, the bed includes two large, dark-colored storage drawers integrated into the base, providing additional functionality. The overall design is minimalist and practical, suitable for contemporary urban interiors. The bed sits low to the ground, emphasizing stability and ease of access.
description: A modern double bed with a white frame, gray comforter, two pillows, and integrated dark storage drawers. The design is minimalist and functional.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white headboard, gray bedding, and two large dark storage drawers at the base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the gray comforter, two pillows, and the symmetrical, clean lines of the bed frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the headboard, bedding, and storage drawers visible, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid, rectangular white headboard with no visible bedding or drawers.
